summary: Small matching PR across player trick stats, map collision joint vertex setup, and menu count ranking. It removed a volatile stack-alignment workaround in pl_80037C60 by reinterpreting the incoming s32 argument as union Struct2070, adjusted mpLib_80057424/mpJointListAdd register allocation by indexing groundCollVtx directly from j_inner->vtx_start, and matched mnCount_8025092C by passing the inline loop counter as a parameter plus increasing PAD_STACK from 4 to 12. Bot report records three new 100% matches.

key_files.role: Matched pl_80037C60 by removing volatile stack hack and assigning prev_union through a union reinterpretation of prev2070_int.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, pl_80037C60 99.98% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Matched mpJointListAdd/mpLib_80057424 by removing temp s16 start and using groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start] directly.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, mpJointListAdd 99.98% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Matched mnCount_8025092C by moving inline loop counter into the inline function parameter and changing PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(12).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/mn/mncount.c hunks for mnCount_8025092C_inline and mnCount_8025092C
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, mnCount_8025092C 99.94% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: pl_80037C60 no longer declares volatile s32 prev2070_word or assigns through prev_union.x2070_int; it now uses prev_union = *(union Struct2070*) &prev2070_int.
mpLib_80057424 no longer stores j_inner->vtx_start in a temporary s16 start before indexing groundCollVtx; the index expression is kept direct.
mnCount_8025092C_inline now takes int i as a parameter instead of declaring it locally, and the caller passes 0.
The bot report recorded three new matches and an overall matched-code increase of +0.07%, +2552 bytes.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: Removed an acknowledged fake volatile stack workaround once a more direct union reinterpretation produced the desired stack layout.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed @todo and volatile prev2070_word in pltrick.c

smart_moves.text: Tested expression shape/register allocation by removing a small temporary and indexing through the original field access directly.
Adjusted inline function parameterization rather than only local declarations when matching stack and loop-counter placement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mncount.c inline signature and call change

decomp_lessons.lesson: A volatile local used only as a stack/register steering hack should be revisited; a direct type reinterpretation of an existing argument may produce the intended stack layout with less fake source.
For MWCC register allocation, introducing a temporary for a struct field can hurt matching; keeping the field expression directly in an array index may be the original shape.
Inline helper shape can affect matching: moving a loop counter from a local declaration into a helper parameter and passing the initial value can alter stack/layout enough to match.
PAD_STACK size changes are narrow matching tactics and should be tied to explicit match evidence; here PAD_STACK(12) is associated with the reported mnCount_8025092C match.

naming_conventions.text: No broad naming convention change is evidenced. Existing address-style names such as pl_80037C60, mnCount_8025092C, and field-style names like x2070_int were retained.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove volatile local stack-alignment hack and use direct union reinterpretation from the incoming s32 argument.
Eliminate a temporary field copy to improve register allocation, using groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start] directly.
Pass the inline helper's loop counter initial value as a parameter instead of declaring the counter locally inside the inline.
Adjust stack padding from PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(12) for mnCount_8025092C.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev bot reported 3 new matches: pl_80037C60, mpJointListAdd, and mnCount_8025092C each reached 100.00%; matched code increased by +0.07%, +2552 bytes.
No human review comments were included in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: pl_80037C60 volatile prev2070_word stack misaligned Struct2070

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, changed files, counts
human_pr_text: author summary explaining the matching changes
raw_diff: exact changed lines in three files
notes: Evidence is strong for what changed and for the bot-reported match outcomes.
There are no human review comments, so reviewer intent or review discussion cannot be inferred.
The PR body states why the tactics helped, but no raw objdiff logs beyond the bot report are included in the slice.
The title mentions mpJointListAdd while the diff hunk is in mpLib_80057424; the PR body says the loop is shared/inlined, but broader callgraph details are not independently proven by this slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace volatile stack steering with direct union reinterpretation when evidence supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: In pl_80037C60, removing a volatile s32 workaround and assigning prev_union via *(union Struct2070*) &prev2070_int was associated with a 100% match in the bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Direct field-index expression can fix register allocation
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mpLib_80057424/mpJointListAdd, removing a temp s16 start and using groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start] directly was described as fixing register allocation and was associated with a 100% match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline loop counter placement can affect stack layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mnCount_8025092C, making the inline helper take int i and calling mnCount_8025092C_inline(0), together with PAD_STACK(12), was associated with the function reaching 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: Document volatile-local removal as a cleanup target when a typed reinterpretation matches
source_update_candidates.text: This PR is another example that volatile locals used only for stack/register steering should be treated as temporary tactics. If a type-aware expression such as a union reinterpretation of an existing argument matches, prefer it over retaining the fake volatile.
source_update_candidates.reason: Consistent with current standards, but curator may want this concrete pattern indexed as a searchable example rather than a new rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Index expression shape and local temporaries can affect MWCC register allocation
source_update_candidates.text: The mpLib_80057424 change suggests that removing a small temporary field copy and indexing through the original field expression can be a valid matching tactic when supported by objdiff/bot evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential reusable tactic, but it should remain evidence-gated and not become a blanket instruction to remove temporaries.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize that union pointer casts are always preferred; this slice only supports the specific pl_80037C60 Struct2070 case.
Do not record PAD_STACK(12) as a general fix for mncount or menu code; the evidence is local to mnCount_8025092C.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not promote mpJointListAdd/mpLib_80057424 relationship beyond the PR body's statement that the loop is shared/inlined without additional source/callgraph evidence.
